content: I want to understand how to establish communication with userspace and rust kernel module. In C I would use genetlink - how to do it in Rust while cargo is not available and we cannot use crates like neli/netlink etc?
This topic was moved here from #Help > Establish communication with userspace-my-rust-kernel-module by Nikolai Shv.
Currently you'd have to use the generated C bindings in the kernel::uapi module. Those APIs don't have a Rust counterpart yet.
